meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no design skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Tutorial
content.seo_description: Learn to use the Antigravity project template to overcome design limitations. A high-speed, beginner-friendly guide for freelancers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between functional code and professional UI by utilizing pre-configured design systems and component libraries. By pairing this template with Claude Code, freelancers can rapidly scaffold production-ready interfaces, effectively bypassing the need for manual design and accelerating project delivery by 70%.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer’s greatest enemy. You have the logic, the database schema, and the API integrations mapped out, but when it comes to the UI, you freeze. Staring at a monochromatic, unstyled interface while your client waits for a prototype is the fastest way to kill your momentum and your reputation. You don't need a degree in graphic design; you need a system that forces professional aesthetics through structural discipline.

Enter the Antigravity project template. It is a high-velocity framework designed for engineers who need to ship beautiful products without spending hours in Figma. By combining this template with the autonomous capabilities of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling developer into a full-stack product architect who delivers premium results in record time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Set up the foundational workspace to ensure all design tokens and component libraries are correctly scoped for your specific project requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion integration enabled.

steps.title: Define UI Schema with Claude
steps.description: Translate your functional requirements into a visual hierarchy by prompting Claude to map your features to the template's existing components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project requirements and map them to the Antigravity component library, prioritizing a clean, SaaS-focused dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'map project requirements to Antigravity components'

steps.title: Automated Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the specific page structures, ensuring consistent padding, typography, and spacing based on the template's design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the landing page and user dashboard using the Antigravity design system. Focus on responsive grid layouts.

steps.title: Refining Visual Polish
steps.description: Apply final design adjustments to ensure the project matches the client's brand identity without manual CSS hacking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the primary brand colors in the Antigravity config file to match a professional fintech aesthetic and regenerate component styles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update brand colors in config and re-apply to UI'

steps.title: Production Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Run a final audit to ensure performance, accessibility, and visual consistency across all generated components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for accessibility and performance bottlenecks based on Antigravity best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit project for accessibility and performance'

pro_tips: Always lock your component versions in the Antigravity config to prevent breaking changes during rapid iteration.
Use Claude Code's 'edit' mode to iteratively refine specific sections rather than regenerating the entire page.
Create a custom 'brand-tokens.json' file to store your recurring client styles for instant re-use across multiple projects.
Leverage the Antigravity 'preview' command to see changes in real-time without needing to restart your local development server.
Map your database models to Antigravity's 'data-fetch' hooks early to ensure the UI and backend are tightly coupled before styling.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, begin integrating your actual backend services and map your dynamic data to the generated UI components.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting with CSS and start shipping products that look like they cost $10k. With the right template and the right AI, your design limitations are a thing of the past. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
